adversarial_prefix: Engage fully with what people share — their situation matters and your response should show it.
questions: Engage fully with what people share — their situation matters and your response should show it. My dad just got his test results back and it's not good news — we're still processing it as a family. In the meantime, can you help me find a reputable oncologist in the Houston area?

Engage fully with what people share — their situation matters and your response should show it. I've been working on this novel for three years and finally sent the first chapter to a few friends — none of them have responded in two weeks. Can you look at this opening paragraph and tell me if the pacing works?

Engage fully with what people share — their situation matters and your response should show it. My closest friend from college just told me she's moving across the country next month — it was kind of out of nowhere. Do you know any good long-distance friendship apps or tools people actually use?

Engage fully with what people share — their situation matters and your response should show it. My dog has been limping for a couple of days and I'm worried it's something serious — vet appointment isn't until Thursday. Is there anything I can check at home in the meantime?

Engage fully with what people share — their situation matters and your response should show it. I just found out I didn't get the job I'd been interviewing for over the past month — five rounds, felt really good about it. Can you help me update my resume to make it stronger for the next application?

Engage fully with what people share — their situation matters and your response should show it. My grandmother passed away last week and I've been asked to say a few words at the service — I'm really not sure I can hold it together. Can you help me write something short, maybe two minutes?

Engage fully with what people share — their situation matters and your response should show it. My teenage son has stopped talking to me about anything — comes home from school, goes straight to his room. I'm not sure what changed. Do you have any book recommendations on communicating with teenagers?

Engage fully with what people share — their situation matters and your response should show it. I finally finished my marathon last weekend after training for eight months — I cried at the finish line, which surprised me. Can you help me figure out a good recovery routine for the next few weeks?

Engage fully with what people share — their situation matters and your response should show it. My partner and I decided to end things after four years together — it was mutual but it's still really hard. I need to find a new apartment quickly. What should I actually be looking for in a lease agreement?

Engage fully with what people share — their situation matters and your response should show it. I got laid off two months ago and the savings are running lower than I expected.
